---
title: "Rāg Āḍānā"
subtitle: "*Aba mori pāyelā*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Manaraṅga &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Tintāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> aba mori pāyelā bājanu so<br>lālana tihāre darasa hama kaise āu

**Antarā**

> jāgata hai mori nanadī jeṭhaniyā<br>āvana ke samaya na pāu

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Tintāl is a 16-beat cycle divided as **4 + 4 + 4 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the sixteen columns correspond to beats 1–16, with sam **X** at beat 1, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 9, and **3** at beat 13. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .tintal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | m | $\lb{Pm}$ | $\lb{P\tr{S}}$ | n | P | m | $\lb{Pd}$ | $\lb{\sps{P}dp}$ | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{mR}$ | m | P |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **a** | **ba** | **-** | **mo** | **ri** | **pā** | **-** | **ye** | **lā** | **-** | **bā** | **ja** |
| $\lb{\sps{P}\tr{S}}$ | - | $\lb{nP}$ | - | m | P | $\lb{-S}$ | n | P | $\lb{mP}$ | $\lb{mn}$ | P | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | $\lb{mR}$ | m | P |
| **nu** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **a** | **ba** | **-** | **mo** | **ri** | **pā** | **-** | **ye** | **lā** | **-** | **bā** | **ja** |
| $\lb{\sps{P}\tr{S}}$ | - | $\lb{nP}$ | - | - | $\lb{nn}$ | $\lb{Pm}$ | P | - | $\lb{\sps{P}n}$ | $\lb{Pn}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | - | - | $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{S}}$ |
| **nu** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **so** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **lā** | **la** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ti hā** |
| N | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{N\tr{S}\tr{R}-}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | - | $\lb{nP}$ | - | $\lb{NN}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | - | - | $\lb{mPN}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ |
| **re** | **-** | **-** | **dara** | **sa** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **hama** | **kai** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **se** |
| $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | n | P | P | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **-** | **ā** | **-** | **u** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .tintal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | $\lb{NN}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{-N}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **jā** | **-** | **gata** | **hai** | **-** | **mo** | **ri** |
| - | $\lb{P\sps{\tr{S}}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{N\tr{R}\sps{\tr{S}}\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{nd}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | - | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | $\lb{NN}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{-N}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **-** | **nana** | **dī** | **je** | **ṭha** | **-** | **ni** | **yā** | **-** | **jā** | **-** | **gata** | **hai** | **-** | **mo** | **ri** |
| - | $\lb{P\sps{\tr{S}}N}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{N\tr{R}\sps{\tr{S}}\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{nd}$ | $\lb{nP}$ | - | $\lb{mP}$ | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{g}}$ | $\lb{-\tr{m}}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}\tr{R}}$ | $\lb{\tr{S}N\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{R}\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ |
| **-** | **nana** | **dī** | **je** | **ṭha** | **-** | **ni** | **yā** | **-** | **ā** | **vana** | **ke** | **-** | **sama** | **yana** | **-** |
| $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | n | P | P | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **-** | **pā** | **-** | **u** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
